REPLY IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR LEAVE OF COURT FOR ADDITIONAL DEPOSITIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 200034072) FILED BY DEFENDANT ORTIZ, LORENA N.

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, JUL-14-2021 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT LORENA ORTIZ'S MOTION FOR LEAVE OF COURT FOR ADDITIONAL DEPOSITIONS. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING, AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MAY APPEAR AT THE DEPOSITIONS VIA ZOOM OR NOT AT ALL, AND THAT EACH DEPOSITION WILL BE LIMITED TO TWO HOURS MAXIMUM. DEFENSE COUNSEL TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT TOM@THOMASCOHEN.COM (CC'ING OPPOSING COUNSEL). JUDGE PRO TEM: TOM COHEN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Mar-10-2022 Off Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Arbitrator Assigned Directly

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court For Additional Depositions
Off Calendar Jul-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JORDAN D. TAYLOR, Esq. of Benson Legal, APC (Tel: 818-708-1250) for plaintiff;
Atty. ESTHER ISMAYELYAN, Esq. of Lauria Tokunaga Gates & Linn, LLP (Tel: 916-492-2000) for defendant Lorena Ortiz.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LORENA ORTIZ's Motion For Leave Of Court For Additional Depositions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and rules as follows: Defendant's motion is granted on the condition that plaintiff's counsel may appear at the depositions via Zoom or not at all, and that each deposition will be limited to two hours maximum.

Defense counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at tom@thomascohen.com (cc'ing opposing counsel).

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
